payloads.text:
Good. The drafts reference many figures and tables. Let me catalog what's needed for stage 4.8:

Concept diagrams (user generates with Gemini):
- Fig. 1: MLLM architecture overview
- Fig. 2: RAG pipeline / noise patterns
- Fig. 3: Framework (figure*, double-column)
- Fig. 4: RAG imputation process
- Fig. 5: Attention weights visualization

Data figures (Artist generates):
- Fig. 6: Accuracy vs SNR
- Fig. 7: Missing modality performance
- Fig. 8: Confusion matrices
- Fig. 9: t-SNE visualization
- Fig. 10: Attention maps
- Fig. 11: Scalability

Tables (already in tex files):
- Table I: Notation, Table II: Hyperparameters, Table III: Datasets, Table IV: Results, Table V: Ablation, Table VI: Failures, Table VII: Efficiency, Table VIII: Deployment

Now I need to dispatch the Artist for concept diagram prompts. Let me first check Artist health.
